summary: Iteration 19 - Teklif Yonetimi (Proposals) Testing Complete. All 14/14 backend API tests PASSED (100%). Frontend UI tested: navigation to Teklifler page, stats cards, filter buttons, search input, expanding proposal details (konaklama, yemek, ek hizmetler, genel toplam), creating new proposals via form dialog, status updates, duplicate, and delete functionality all working correctly.

issues: Minor: React hydration warning in console about <span> being child of <option> inside select element - doesn't affect functionality but should be cleaned up

action_items: Minor: Fix React hydration warning in ProposalsPage.js select element (line 363-365) - remove span wrapper around option children
critical_code_review_comments: Proposals API correctly implements all CRUD operations: list, get, create, update, duplicate, delete
Stats endpoint correctly aggregates proposal counts and values by status
Frontend ProposalsPage correctly uses api.js for all API calls
Expand/collapse proposal details works correctly showing konaklama, yemek, ek hizmetler sections
Dynamic total calculation in create form works correctly
Filter buttons (Tumu, Taslak, Gonderildi, Kabul Edildi, Reddedildi, Suresi Doldu) work correctly
Search input filters by customer name, phone, proposal number correctly (client-side)
seed_data_creation: Two seed proposals exist: TKL-2026-001 (Gizem Yuzak, dugun) and TKL-2026-002 (Ayse Demir, nisan). Test data (TEST_UI Kullanici) was created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified: (1) Proposals API fully functional - all endpoints return correct data, (2) Frontend ProposalsPage integrated correctly with backend, (3) Stats show correct counts (total, draft, sent, accepted, rejected, expired, total_value, accepted_value, conversion_rate), (4) Expand row shows konaklama, yemek, ek hizmetler, genel toplam details, (5) Create dialog with form fields for customer info, event details, accommodation, meals, extra services, (6) Status update buttons (Gonderildi, Kabul Edildi, Reddedildi) visible based on current status, (7) Duplicate creates new proposal with '(Kopya)' suffix, (8) Delete removes proposal after confirmation.

backend_api.GET /api/proposals: PASS - Returns list with proposals and total count
backend_api.GET /api/proposals/stats/summary: PASS - Returns stats (total, draft, sent, accepted, rejected, expired, total_value, accepted_value, conversion_rate)
backend_api.POST /api/proposals: PASS - Creates new proposal with auto-generated TKL-YYYY-NNN number
backend_api.POST /api/proposals/{id}/duplicate: PASS - Creates copy with '(Kopya)' suffix and new ID

frontend_ui.nav-proposals: EXISTS - Navigates to Teklif Yonetimi page
frontend_ui.proposals-page: LOADS - Shows header, stats, filters, search, proposal list
frontend_ui.stats_cards: WORKING - Shows Toplam, Taslak, Gonderildi, Kabul, Toplam Deger, Donusum
frontend_ui.filter_buttons: WORKING - Tumu, Taslak, Gonderildi, Kabul Edildi, Reddedildi, Suresi Doldu
frontend_ui.search_input: WORKING - Filters by name, phone, proposal number
frontend_ui.expand_proposal: WORKING - Shows konaklama, yemek, ek hizmetler, genel toplam
frontend_ui.new_proposal_dialog: WORKING - Form with all fields and dynamic total calculation
frontend_ui.action_buttons: WORKING - Gonderildi, Kabul Edildi, Reddedildi, Kopyala, Sil
